address.address1: Jl. Bandara Sultan Iskandar Muda, Gani Residence No. I. 22 Kp Gani Kec Ingin Jaya Kab Aceh Besar

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers car park free of charge. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 5-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

adult: Guests 8 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Take a look at these facilities:

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: ditulis diiklan entire house..sesampai disana hanya 1bilik dan biliknya disewa lg..tanggal3-7hb 2bilik disewa sama yg lain dan harus duduk serumah sama bkn muhrim..rumahnya kecil..sesampinya disana harus ditunggu lama...tidak bisa dicancel dan duit ngak bakal dipulangkan..owner tidak bertolak ansur..sikap juga tidak baik..mahal..jauh dri bandar..suasana tidak bagus...duit saya diambil tidak akan sy halalkn buat ibu sekeluarga jmpa di akhirat sana...
